author: OpenAI
description: Gold Panel subscription-gated Discord access with paid-only protected categories, trial tracking, and access-removal exemptions for Red-DiscordBot.
install_msg: Load the cog, enable slash commands, then run /accessadmin setup.
short: Grant protected Discord access only to verified paid IPTV customers.
end_user_data_statement: Stores Discord user IDs, guild IDs, provider account IDs, subscription state, and synchronization timestamps in Red's cog data directory.
